query: True Detective Night Country total viewership numbers HBO statistics

{"query":"True Detective Night Country total viewership numbers HBO statistics","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1444,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://variety.com/2024/tv/news/true-detective-night-country-finale-ratings-viewership-1235916397/","title":"'True Detective: Night Country' Finale Ratings Deliver Season High","content":"This season’s viewership counts factor in Nielsen’s traditional measurement of linear telecasts as well as Warner Bros.
Discovery’s own internal data regarding its streamer, with both counted across each episode’s first night of availability.
In an interview with Variety, creator Issa López discussed the resolution of the season’s mystery and the storyline’s surprising connection to the first season of the series, starring Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson."},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/true-detective-night-country-ratings-series-highs-1235823863/","title":"'True Detective: Night Country' Ratings Hit Series Highs","content":"The Jodie Foster- and Kali Reis-led fourth season, subtitled Night Country, is averaging 12.7 million viewers across all platforms since its Jan.
The show’s first four episodes averaged about 642,000 viewers for their initial airing on HBO, compared to about 2.6 million for season one.
The numbers for Night Country compare favorably to those of The White Lotus, which averaged 10.1 million viewers going into its finale, and Succession, whose final season stood at 8.7 million viewers over a similar time span."},{"url":"https://www.thewrap.com/true-detective-night-country-season-4-ratings-hbo/","title":"'True Detective: Night Country' Episode 2 Hits 2.6 Million Viewers","content":"Viewership for the second episode of “True Detective: Night Country” brought in 2.6 million viewers across HBO and Max, according to Warner Bros.
Discovery data, up 28% from last week’s season premiere.
While the Alaska-set thriller series from showrunner Issa López initially scored over 2 million viewers across HBO and Max as it debuted last Sunday, viewership for the premiere episode has grown to 7.5 million viewers across platforms.
It’s likely that viewership for “Night Country” will continue to climb, as the final gross audience for “The White Lotus” Season 2 hit 15.5 million viewers while “Euphoria” Season 2 scored a viewership of 19.5 million.
“True Detective: Night Country” marks the fourth season of the HBO anthology series after Woody Harrelson and Matthew McConaughey launched the first season of the show in 2014.
The fourth installment follows estranged detectives Liz Danvers (Foster) and Evangeline Navarro (Reis), who reunite to investigate the disappearance of several men working at the Tsalal Arctic Research Station in the small town of Ennis, Alaska."},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2024/02/true-detective-night-country-most-watched-installment-ratings-1235824827/","title":"'True Detective: Night Country' Is Series' Most Watched Installment","content":"A lot has changed since True Detective starring Matthew McConaughey and Woody Harrelson ran in 2014, breaking records as the most watched freshman season of an HBO series since Six Feet Under.
For Night Country, starring Jodie Foster and Kali Reis, most of the consumption is done on Max, with a fraction of the viewers, 0.6M-0.7M, coming from the original HBO telecast."},{"url":"https://screenrant.com/true-detective-season-4-viewership-record-hbo/","title":"True Detective Season 4 Sets Major HBO Show Record","content":"True Detective: Night Country becomes the show's most-watched season with 12.7 million viewers, surpassing season 1's record of 11.9 million viewers.
The strong viewership numbers indicate that True Detective season 5 is likely to happen, potentially with Issa López returning as showrunner.
This breaks a record set by the beloved season 1, which starred Woody Harrelson and Matthew McConaughey and saw 11.9 million viewers.
The second episode saw a 28% increase from the season premiere with 2.6 million viewers across both platforms.
Though viewership numbers for episode 4 are not available, episode 5, which aired early on Max due to the Super Bowl, saw 5 million viewers."}]}
